rationale: Both evaluations land on the identical score (5/10) and make the same substantive points: strong full-stack and GISCollective geospatial work, but no proven C++/Rust in routing/navigation and a JS/TypeScript/DLang stack misaligned with the role. The wording differs only in run-to-run rephrasing (e.g. 'routing tile generation' vs 'map tiling'), with no new concern, penalty, or reasoning tied to the Berlin-to-Bangalore location change. The relocation carries no job-relevant information and nothing in the variant keys off it.
